note: round6 = Stage-2 DATA-SCALING (image), on the FROZEN config (ti2/ep3/lr3e-4/r32-a64/c_attn/image_px32). Uses clic2024 FULL images (image_crop=0) — NO div2k download: one CLIC pro image ≈ 2600 patches, so 24 images already give a >10x stream-length ladder (~5.2k -> ~62k patches). Non-32-multiple sizes are auto-padded losslessly (patchify pads W/H up to a multiple of 32, reassembly crops back to the original size via framing). mode=both + no_decompress -> static_rate + online_rate + delta per run. Plot both vs image_count: static_rate ~flat (no training), online_rate falls with data -> plateau = headline size, crossover = where online beats static. SLOWEST point image_count=24 (~62k patches x ti=2 ≈ 31k train steps) — will take a while, but bGPT is small. If the clic2024 dir has more than 24 images, raise the top of the ladder.
